company.name: Kelun-Biotech
company.subtitle: OptiDC ADC platform | Sac-TMT TROP2 ADC (4 China approvals) | Merck $10B+ deal | 30+ pipeline programs
company.cashRunway: Funded by parent Kelun Pharma + growing product revenue + Merck milestones

assets.name: Sac-TMT (sacituzumab tirumotecan) — TROP2 ADC
assets.stage: Commercial China (4 indications: TNBC, NSCLC, HR+/HER2- BC x2)

indications.name: TROP2 ADC across solid tumors (China approved, global w/ Merck)

market.notes: Sac-TMT (SKB264/MK-2870): 4 approved indications in China. TROP2 ADC partnered with Merck globally. Phase 3 HR+/HER2- BC vs chemo ongoing. First TROP2 ADC approved for NSCLC globally. Merck deal: $10B+ total value across 3 ADC programs.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: TNBC ~15% of breast = ~45K incident/yr, ~60K prevalent on-tx (short OS limits prevalence). Source: NCI SEER, TNBC Foundation.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 TNBC ~52K incident; ~65K prevalent. EUROCARE + ESMO TNBC consortium.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~120K on-tx; TNBC over-represented in AA/African and younger cohorts per GLOBOCAN.

us.wtpPct.note: ~65% -- Keytruda+chemo (KEYNOTE-522) neoadj SOC; Trodelvy 2L+ NCCN Cat 1; Medicare + commercial broad.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~48% -- NICE approved Keytruda neoadj 2022, Trodelvy 2L 2023; G-BA betraechtlich for both.

row.wtpPct.note: ~15% -- Japan PMDA full reimb; China NRDL pembro 2023; EM rely on chemo (AC-T).

us.priceK.note: Blended $140K: Keytruda+chemo $180K (40% pts) + Trodelvy $155K (25%) + chemo alone $25K (30%) + Talzenna/PARPi $180K (5%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$80K blended; EU net ~57% US list; neoadj pembro course-limited lowers cost vs metastatic.

penPct.note: ~55% peak -- IO+chemo neoadj penetrated 70%+ eligible; Trodelvy 2L standard; Datroway (TROP2) + PARPi extend.

us.reachPct.note: Sac-TMT (SKB264/MK-2870) TROP2 ADC; partnered w/ Merck $1.4B; Ph3 NSCLC + TNBC + HR+ BC; 20% peak reach vs Trodelvy + Datroway.

us.priceK.note: ~$170K/yr WAC parallel to TROP2 ADC class.

us.wtpPct.note: 40% -- Merck commercial leverage in US; payors will compare cross-trial ORR/PFS vs Trodelvy.

row.reachPct.note: 30% -- China home market Sac-TMT approved Nov-2024 TNBC, NRDL 2025; broad hospital access; Kelun dominates domestic.

row.wtpPct.note: 40% -- China NRDL covered ~$25K/yr post-negotiation; Japan/Korea partnership.

market.notes: HER2 ADC approved in China. Competing with Enhertu but differentiated payload-linker. Global development ongoing.

us.patientsK.note: SEER 2024: ~310K new breast/yr; ~15-20% HER2+ = ~50K incident + ~120K prevalent on-tx. Source: NCI SEER, ACS Facts 2024.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~355K new breast/yr (GLOBOCAN 2022); HER2+ ~55K incident, ~140K prevalent on HER2-directed tx.

row.patientsK.note: ROW HER2+ ~200K on-tx; China NCC registry ~420K breast/yr, Japan NCR ~95K, HER2+ ~18%.

us.wtpPct.note: ~70% -- Medicare + commercial full coverage for Enhertu/Herceptin; NCCN Cat 1. 340B uptake strong at academic centers.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~50% -- NICE TA approved Enhertu 2023; G-BA Zusatznutzen betraechtlich; trastuzumab biosim dominant in 1L adj.

row.wtpPct.note: ~18% -- Japan PMDA/C2H full reimb, China NRDL added Enhertu 2023; EM rely on trastuzumab biosim.

us.priceK.note: Blended $165K: Enhertu $165K (35% pts) + Kadcyla $185K (15%) + Herceptin+pertuzumab $130K (30%) + trastuzumab biosim $45K (20%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$95K blended; EU net ~58% of US list. Biosim trastuzumab 1L standard, Enhertu reserved 2L+.

row.priceK.note: ~$35K blended; biosim trastuzumab <$15K drives mix outside Japan/Korea.

penPct.note: ~65% peak -- Enhertu displacing Kadcyla in 2L (DESTINY-Breast03), 5yr ramp vs standing Herceptin base.

us.reachPct.note: A166 HER2 ADC Ph3; HER2+ BC/gastric; 8% peak reach (2029+) vs Enhertu dominance + other HER2 ADCs.

us.priceK.note: ~$180K/yr WAC parallel to HER2 ADC class.

us.wtpPct.note: 20% -- tough to displace Enhertu in US; Merck leverage limited in HER2 class.

row.reachPct.note: 18% -- China domestic A166 NRDL target; Kelun strong.

market.notes: Novel CLDN18.2 ADC. Phase 2/3 development. Hot target — Astellas Zolbetuximab approved for gastric.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~27K gastric + ~22K esophageal/yr US; ~25K on systemic. Source: NCI SEER 2024.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~800K on-tx; China + Japan + Korea >60% global gastric burden (GLOBOCAN 2022).

us.wtpPct.note: ~58% -- Keytruda+chemo 1L (KEYNOTE-859), Enhertu HER2+ 2L, Vyloy CLDN18.2 covered; NCCN Cat 1.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~44% -- NICE approved pembro+chemo + Enhertu + zolbetuximab; G-BA betraechtlich for HER2+.

row.wtpPct.note: ~20% -- Japan PMDA + China NRDL cover IO+chemo; high volume market.

us.priceK.note: Blended $135K: pembro+chemo $175K (40% pts) + Enhertu HER2+ $185K (15%) + Vyloy CLDN18.2 $140K (20%) + chemo alone $25K (25%).

row.priceK.note: ~$32K blended; China/Japan mix with trastuzumab biosim + tislelizumab NRDL price.

penPct.note: ~48% peak -- IO+chemo 1L saturated; CLDN18.2 (Vyloy) ~38% + HER2+ 20% + FGFR2b (bemarituzumab) extend.

us.reachPct.note: SKB315 Claudin 18.2 ADC Ph1/2; gastric/pancreatic; 10% peak reach (2030+) vs Astellas zolbetuximab.

us.wtpPct.note: 25% -- crowded CLDN18.2 space (zolbetuximab mAb + multiple ADCs).

row.reachPct.note: 15% -- China gastric prevalence high, NRDL target.

market.notes: 3 Merck deals totaling $10B+. SKB410/MK-3120 (Nectin-4 ADC) + SKB571/MK-2750 (bsADC). Merck advancing globally. Milestones + royalties to Kelun-Biotech.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~83K new bladder/yr US; ~25K muscle-invasive/metastatic on systemic tx. Source: NCI SEER 2024, BCAN.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~95K new bladder/yr (GLOBOCAN); ~28K on systemic therapy.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~80K on-tx; high incidence in smoking-heavy APAC + aniline dye regions.

us.wtpPct.note: ~62% -- Padcev+Keytruda (EV-302) 1L SOC 2024; Medicare + commercial NCCN Cat 1; BCG shortage drives intravesical alternatives.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~45% -- NICE approved Padcev+pembro 2024; G-BA betraechtlich; gem/cis remains cost-effective comparator.

row.wtpPct.note: ~14% -- Japan J-DPC covers Padcev; China NRDL tislelizumab; EM rely on gem/cis + BCG.

us.priceK.note: Blended $185K: Padcev+pembro $310K (35% pts) + nivo adj $165K (15%) + gem/cis+IO $95K (30%) + chemo alone $20K (20%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$105K blended; EU net ~57% US; Padcev combo priced ~EUR 195K/course.

penPct.note: ~50% peak -- EV+pembro displacing chemo 1L over 5yr; FGFR3 Balversa + HER2 ADCs (disitamab) expand 2L.

us.reachPct.note: Merck-partnered Kelun ADC pipeline (~7 assets $9.3B total deal 2022-23); 12% aggregate peak reach across tumors.

us.wtpPct.note: 30% -- Merck commercial push; payor access indication-dependent.

assets.name: OptiDC platform + early pipeline (RDC, iADC, DAC, non-onc)

market.notes: OptiDC proprietary platform. Bispecific ADCs, RDCs, iADCs, DACs. Expanding into autoimmune (TSLP bsAb) + COPD. Crescent Biopharma partnership. One of worlds leading ADC platforms.

us.patientsK.note: ~250K US addressable across HER2/TROP2/HER3/CEACAM5/B7-H3 ADCs; sum of biomarker-positive solid tumors. Source: company 10-Ks.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~320K ADC-addressable solid tumors; ESMO testing expansion.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~900K; broad solid tumor ADC potential in APAC/EM.

us.wtpPct.note: ~55% -- approved ADCs (Enhertu, Trodelvy, Padcev, Elahere) across HER2/TROP2/Nectin4/FRa; Medicare + commercial broad.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~42% -- NICE + G-BA approved major ADCs; France ASMR II-III.

row.wtpPct.note: ~14% -- Japan PMDA (DS-origin Enhertu); China NRDL disitamab vedotin + RC48.

us.priceK.note: Blended $195K: HER2 ADC $205K (30% pts) + TROP2 ADC $200K (25%) + Nectin4 ADC $310K (8%) + FRa ADC $220K (10%) + others $180K (27%).

penPct.note: ~40% peak -- platform addresses broad range; launch curves staggered by asset; 5-7yr ramp across targets.

us.reachPct.note: Next-gen ADC platform (topo + novel payloads); 6% aggregate peak reach (2033+).

mega_bear.narrative: China pricing pressure + Merck deprioritizes ADC programs + global competition
events: X NRDL pricing crushes China product margins
X Merck slows ADC development — milestones delayed
X TROP2 ADC crowded — Gilead Trodelvy, Daiichi DS-1062
-> Platform value limited, stock to HKD 50-60

bear.narrative: China products grow but global competition limits + Merck milestones trickling
events: V Sac-TMT grows in China but pricing headwinds
~ Merck advancing but slowly — milestones delayed
X TROP2 global market competitive with Trodelvy/DS-1062
-> Moderate revenue growth, platform undervalued

base.narrative: China ADC leader + Merck partnership delivers globally + OptiDC platform validated
events: V Sac-TMT dominant TROP2 ADC in China across 5+ indications
V Merck milestones flowing — global registrations advancing
V A166 + SKB315 building multi-ADC franchise
V Revenue RMB 5B+ by 2028, profitable

bull.narrative: Global ADC powerhouse — Merck deals fully realized + platform generates $20B+ partnerships
events: V Sac-TMT global approval via Merck — $3B+ franchise
V Nectin-4 + bsADC Merck programs succeed — additional $5B+
V OptiDC platform generates 3+ new major partnerships
V Total deal value exceeds $20B across partnerships

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Kelun-Biotech becomes global ADC leader — world-class platform rivals Daiichi/Seagen
events: V OptiDC platform generates 5+ approved ADCs globally
V Merck + additional pharma partnerships exceed $30B total value
V Platform extends to autoimmune, CNS, metabolic — beyond oncology
V Market cap approaches HKD 500B+ — premier China biotech globally

lastData.title: 4 products / 8 indications approved in China + Merck $10B+ partnership advancing
points: 4 products approved in China (sac-TMT, A166, tagitanlimab, cetuximab N01)
Sac-TMT: 4 indications (TNBC, NSCLC x2, HR+/HER2- BC)
Merck partnership: 3 ADC deals, $10B+ total value
Expanding into bsADC, RDC, iADC, DAC modalities
Non-oncology expansion: TSLP bsAb (AD), COPD, autoimmune
Listed on HKEX (6990.HK), subsidiary of Kelun Pharma (002422.SZ)

nextCatalyst.title: SORENTO GEP-NET primary readout + Merck milestones + global registrations
thresholds: Merck global regulatory submissions for sac-TMT

risks: TROP2 ADC space extremely competitive globally
HK-listed with limited international investor access
Revenue primarily China-derived — currency + regulatory risk

catalysts.title: ELCC 2026 Sac-TMT EGFR-mutant NSCLC final OS analysis LBA
catalysts._rationale: Confirmed ELCC LBA presentation of sac-TMT OS data in 3L EGFR-mutant NSCLC

catalysts.title: SKB105 (ITGB6-ADC) Phase 1/2 trial initiation
catalysts._rationale: Company confirmed Q1 2026 start for SKB105 Phase 1/2 trial in partnership with Crescent
